nasb.text: Remember them, O my God, because they have defiled the priesthood and the covenant of the priesthood and the Levites.

esv.text: Remember them, O my God, because they have desecrated the priesthood and the covenant of the priesthood and the Levites.

cnv.text: “我的　神啊，求你記住他們，因為他們玷污了祭司的職分，也污辱了祭司職分和利未人的約。”

ccb.text: 我的上帝啊，求你记住他们，因为他们玷污了祭司的职分，违背了你与祭司和利未人所立的约。
